response.name: SSH Agent
response.body:
{
    "status": "success",
    "data": {
        "sessionId": "1764510497098",
        "response": "Great! To test SSH connectivity, I’ll need some details:

1. Hostname or IP address of the server you want to connect to
2. SSH username
3. (Optional) Port number (default is 22)
4. Authentication method:
   - Password (tell me the password)
   - Private key (paste the key or upload)

Please provide these details (you may omit sensitive info or redact passwords/keys if you prefer). Once you do, I’ll proceed with the SSH connectivity test."
    }
}
